Package de.uka.ilkd.key.prover.impl

Class ApplyStrategyInfo

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.prover.impl.ApplyStrategyInfo
public class ApplyStrategyInfo extends Object
The final result of the strategy application is stored in this container and returned to the instance that started the strategies. It contains statistic information about the number of applied rules, time needed or number of closed goals. In case the rule application stopped at a non-closeable goal, this goal is also stored to allow the caller to e.g. present it to the user for interaction. In case of an unexpected, the thrown exception can be also retrieved from this container.
